bonus_items.title: Non-dict YAML crashes config merge
bonus_items.evidence: merged.update(data) is called without verifying the parsed value type ... crash on valid YAML that is not a mapping

bonus_items.title: SQLite foreign keys not enforced
bonus_items.evidence: Enable SQLite foreign-key enforcement on each new connection ... PRAGMA foreign_keys is turned on

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded SECRET_KEY
bonus_items.evidence: The SECRET_KEY definition in auth.py is hardcoded and should be sourced from the environment instead

bonus_items.title: Non-constant-time password comparison
bonus_items.evidence: verify_password currently uses a normal equality check, which can leak timing information

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer mints funds
bonus_items.evidence: transfer function ... allows self-transfers to mint funds because transfer computes source and destination balances from the same account snapshot

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amount not rejected
bonus_items.evidence: lets negative amounts bypass the src["balance"] < amount guard and invert the transfer direction

bonus_items.title: /transfer endpoint lacks auth/ownership checks
bonus_items.evidence: do_transfer currently accepts arbitrary from/to/amount values with no auth or ownership checks

bonus_items.title: login KeyError on missing fields
bonus_items.evidence: login handler ... indexes body["username"] and body["password"] directly, which can raise KeyError and turn malformed requests into 500s

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded SECRET_KEY
bonus_items.evidence: The SECRET_KEY in the auth module is hardcoded instead of being sourced from the environment

bonus_items.title: update_balance ignores rowcount (silent no-op on missing account)
bonus_items.evidence: update_balance function currently ignores whether the UPDATE matched any rows, so a missing account_id is treated as success

bonus_items.title: transfer allows non-positive amounts
bonus_items.evidence: negative or zero values can bypass the existing insufficient-funds logic and invert the transfer direction

bonus_items.title: login handler unvalidated JSON body
bonus_items.evidence: assuming request.get_json(force=True) always returns a dict... can raise an unhandled error on missing or malformed input

bonus_items.title: config merge fails on non-mapping YAML
bonus_items.evidence: check that the parsed YAML result is a mapping before calling merged.update(data)

bonus_items.title: SQLite foreign keys not enforced
bonus_items.evidence: Enable foreign key enforcement on every SQLite connection created by get_conn so accounts cannot become orphaned

bonus_items.title: config.yaml not gitignored
bonus_items.evidence: .gitignore currently omits config.yaml, so local configuration copied from config.example.yaml can be committed by accident

bonus_items.title: Non-constant-time password hash comparison
bonus_items.evidence: compares hashes with a normal equality check, which can leak timing information ... use hmac.compare_digest

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded SECRET_KEY committed literal
bonus_items.evidence: SECRET_KEY in auth.py is currently a committed literal ... read from the environment instead of being hardcoded

bonus_items.title: Missing non-positive amount guard in transfer
bonus_items.evidence: reject amount values that are less than or equal to zero ... transfer cannot be inverted by a negative or zero amount

bonus_items.title: Missing auth/ownership check on /transfer endpoint
bonus_items.evidence: do_transfer currently allows anonymous callers to move money from any source account

bonus_items.title: config.yaml tracked / sqlite sidecars not ignored
bonus_items.evidence: config.yaml is still tracked and vault.db does not cover its companion files
